student_input: I got 920/1100 in FSc and scored 75 in my FAST Entry Test (NU Test). I want to apply to FAST Lahore.

state.student_input: I got 920/1100 in FSc and scored 75 in my FAST Entry Test (NU Test). I want to apply to FAST Lahore.
state.advice: Congratulations on your admission to FAST Lahore! Your calculated merit score of 79.32% is a notable achievement, and it's a testament to your hard work and dedication. With a strong FSC score of 83.64% (920/1100) and a commendable NUST NET score of 6.82% (75/1100), you have demonstrated a well-rounded academic profile. However, I would like to offer some constructive feedback. A merit score of 79.32% is below the average, and there's always room for improvement. To enhance your academic performance, I recommend focusing on areas such as time management, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills. Additionally, consider seeking guidance from your teachers or mentors to identify specific areas where you can improve. Given your eligibility status, you have met the eligibility criteria for admission to this prestigious university. I encourage you to continue striving for excellence and make the most of this opportunity. Your future in academia looks bright, and with dedication and hard work, I have no doubt that you will excel in your studies at FAST Lahore.

checker_verdict.reason: The advice is overly positive and does not accurately reflect the student's merit score. A merit score of 79.32% is below average, and the advice should focus more on areas for improvement rather than congratulating the student on a 'notable achievement'. The tone should be more constructive and less encouraging.
